CancelExportTask.description: Grants permission to cancel an ongoing export task

CancelImportTask.description: Grants permission to cancel an ongoing import task

CancelQuery.description: Grants permission to cancel a query

CreateGraph.description: Grants permission to create a new graph

CreateGraphSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a new snapshot from an existing graph

CreateGraphUsingImportTask.description: Grants permission to create a new graph while importing data into the new graph

CreatePrivateGraphEndpoint.description: Grants permission to create a new private graph endpoint to access the graph from within a vpc

DeleteDataViaQuery.description: Grants permission to delete data via query APIs on the graph

DeleteGraph.description: Grants permission to delete a graph

DeleteGraphSnapshot.description: Grants permission to delete a snapshot

DeletePrivateGraphEndpoint.description: Grants permission to delete a private graph endpoint of a graph

GetEngineStatus.description: Grants permission to get the engine status of the graph

GetExportTask.description: Grants permission to get details about an export task

GetGraph.description: Grants permission to get details about a graph

GetGraphSnapshot.description: Grants permission to get details about a snapshot

GetGraphSummary.description: Grants permission to get the summary for the data in the graph

GetImportTask.description: Grants permission to get details about an import task

GetPrivateGraphEndpoint.description: Grants permission to get details about a private graph endpoint of a graph

GetQueryStatus.description: Grants permission to check the status of a given query

GetStatisticsStatus.description: Grants permission to get the statistics for the data in the graph

ListExportTasks.description: Grants permission to list the export tasks in your account

ListGraphSnapshots.description: Grants permission to list the snapshots in your account

ListGraphs.description: Grants permission to list the graphs in your account

ListImportTasks.description: Grants permission to list the import tasks in your account

ListPrivateGraphEndpoints.description: Grants permission to list the private graph endpoints for a given graph

ListQueries.description: Grants permission to check the status of all active queries

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to lists tag for a Neptune Analytics resource

ReadDataViaQuery.description: Grants permission to read data via query APIs on the graph

ResetGraph.description: Grants permission to reset a graph which deletes all data within the graph

RestoreGraphFromSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a new graph from an existing snapshot

StartExportTask.description: Grants permission to export data from an existing graph

StartGraph.description: Grants permission to start a graph

StartImportTask.description: Grants permission to import data into an existing graph

StopGraph.description: Grants permission to stop a graph

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a Neptune Analytics resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a Neptune Analytics resource

UpdateGraph.description: Grants permission to modify a graph

WriteDataViaQuery.description: Grants permission to write data via query APIs on the graph

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag's key and value in a request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys in a request

neptune-graph:PublicConnectivity.description: Filters access by the value of the public connectivity parameter provided in the request or its default value, if unspecified. All access to graphs is IAM authenticated
